entry.title: Explode BOM with previous or new production version?
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

We are doing system conversion from ECC 6 to S4 HANA. As the production version is mandatory in S4. we create PV for BOM header material. After that to create sub contracting PO, if we click the "Explode BOM" button in Item-->Material Data view, a window pop-up with message" Previous production version differs from prod. version 0001. Explode BOM with previous or new production version?" Is it possible to stop this message pop-up?

Best Regards

entry.title: 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects
entry.content:
In this session, you'll see how to use 2 key features for adding governance to SAP Build. First, a brand new feature lets you create processes (yes, with SAP Build Process Automation!) to enforce who can create SAP Build projects and who can request to transport projects to QA and Prod. Second, learn how to set up true Dev/QA/Prod environments for SAP Build Apps projects and to enable transport between those tenants.

Speaker: Dinesh Singh

Dinesh is a product manager specializing in SAP Build, with a focus on governance and actions. He brings approximately 15 years of experience in various SAP technologies, having held roles as a consultant, solution architect and product manager. Outside of work, he enjoys playing soccer and cricket, and at home, he is an avid fan of Marvel movies.

entry.title: 🟣 Extend Joule with Your Own Skills
entry.content:
Extend Joule, SAP’s business-oriented AI copilot, so that it responds to your custom prompts and can perform actions that you define. Using the SAP Build's low-code design environment, define new skills for Joule, such as updating an invoice so user’s can simply ask Joule to “add a discount to this invoice”. We will also share potential use cases that may be of interest to you, as well as our vision for integrating advanced Generative AI capabilities and AI agents.

Speaker: 

  • Miguel Angel Meza Martinez
  • Fred Vanborre

Miguel is a senior product manager at SAP Build, focusing on planning and executing the integration of AI capabilities into SAP Build Process Automation. He started his career at SAP in 2018 as a PhD student in the Business Process Management (BPM) team working on implementation of proof-of-concept AI use cases for the workflow management solution. Outside work, Miguel likes to hike and ride his bike in nature, listen to music and podcasts, and dance.

Fred Vanborre is a product owner at SAP, focusing on SAP Build Process Automation generative AI capabilities. He has worked at SAP for more than 20 years mainly in product management and engineering.

entry.title: 🟣 Putting It All Together: S/4HANA Retail Pricing App Using SAP Build, AI, Event Mesh and More
entry.content:
In this session, we’ll build an application for real-time retail sales events (“flash sales”). Using SAP Build Code with SAP Joule, we’ll create a backend service that can broadcast pricing updates to electronic store shelf labels, creating real-time sales events. We’ll use SAP Build Process Automation to automate pricing approvals and orchestrate the real-time action. Also part of the solution: SAP Build Work Zone, Event Mesh, SAP Build Apps and Fiori Elements.

Speaker: Eric Solberg

entry.title: Re: No of Same Work Center
entry.content:
Hello @raviram08 

Number of capacities is maintained in work center master, on capacity level:

See the note 2600113 - Workcenter capacity fields cannot be edited if you can't edit the field.

The impact on the scheduling is that an operation can be executed in parallel on individual capacities / machines of a work center. Maximum number of machines used for an operation is defined in a routing operation details as maximum splits.

Bear in mind that ultimately both costing and scheduling depend on formulas and these are often heavily customized.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content:
I am appreciating for your efforts.

I used your formula in this link and obtained the correct result 4.33.22.

Solved: Convert Solid number to 00:00:00 format - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Custom code adaptation for SAP S/4HANA - FAQ
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this! Will take this as reference document.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting with chargeable components
entry.content:
Hi Kidd,

Thank you for raising this question.

The subcontracting solution (Subcontracting with Chargeable Components solution) specifically for Japan, which is available in the on-premise version, is currently not available in S4 Hana Public Cloud. It is unknown whether it will be made available in the Public Cloud in the future. We have checked the roadmap for upcoming releases and no note of it, and there is no indication that it will be added as of this date.

We regret that this information may not meet your expectations.

Kind Regards,
Evol

entry.title: Re: CKR1 timing issue
entry.content: Hi Darrell, do you already have an s-user? Maybe you need to contact your support service to grant you access. I hope this helps. Kind regards, Jessica

entry.title: Re: In-process inspection result recording mandatory before operation wise production order confirma
entry.content:
In configuration "define confirmation parameter" make operation sequence "error when operation sequence is not adhered" and results record (QM) "Error message if no inspection results exist" for QM results recording mandatory against the production order type.

 Each inspection character will have different accepted and rejected qty. Hence, automate the confirmation based on inspection results recording might not be a good approach.

entry.title: A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER"
entry.content:
Below is my code to define a class. When I activate it, it has error message : A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER". And I can see there are two class with same name in the function group. Why?

CLASS lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
      INHERITING FROM cl_foreign_application_view_mm.
  PUBLIC SECTION.

    METHODS: constructor
                  IMPORTING im_dynpro         TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_prog           TYPE sy-repid
                            im_priority       TYPE i OPTIONAL
                            im_foreign_prog   TYPE sy-repid
                            im_foreign_dynpro TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_metafield      TYPE mmpur_metafield.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
    METHODS: build_dynpro_fields  REDEFINITION.
    METHODS: transport_from_model REDEFINITION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: custom_metafield TYPE mmpur_metafield.
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.

    CALL METHOD super->constructor
      EXPORTING
        im_dynpro         = im_dynpro
        im_prog           = im_prog
        im_priority       = im_priority
        im_foreign_prog   = im_foreign_prog
        im_foreign_dynpro = im_foreign_dynpro.
    custom_metafield = im_metafield.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "CONSTRUCTOR
  METHOD build_dynpro_fields.
    DATA: l_dynpro_entry LIKE LINE OF my_dynpro_fields.
    l_dynpro_entry-metafield = custom_metafield.
    INSERT l_dynpro_entry INTO TABLE my_dynpro_fields.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "BUILD_DYNPRO_FIELDS
  METHOD transport_from_model.
    foreign_application_ok = mmpur_yes.

*    set model to function group
    processed_model = my_model.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "transport_from_model
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION

entry.content: Hello, your question has been forwarded to the experts. We hope to provide an answer soon. Kind regards, Jessica

Ragards,

Niels

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello, I'm from Cairo, Egypt. Cairo is a vibrant city known for its rich history, stunning architecture, and cultural heritage. It's home to the iconic pyramids of Giza, the bustling Khan El Khalili market, and the beautiful Nile River. Growing up in such a historic and lively place has given me a deep appreciation for both ancient traditions and modern urban life.

entry.title: Re: MDG - Edition Concept
entry.content: Any thoughts or feedback experts?

entry.title: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
In this blog post I’d like to outline the innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in the area of Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management. These are the topics that are covered:

  • Reserving Material Using Project Demand (4RF)
  • Creating a Project by Copying an Existing Project Using an API (1NT, 1YF)
  • Integration with Project Plan Collaboration (6JN)

Check out my video to get a glimpse of the new features:

 

 

Reserving Material Using Project Demand

To simplify project planning, we’ve built on our functionality for project demands. A project demand represents a certain need of a particular WBS (Work Breakdown Structure) element at a specific time and location. It enables you to plan, trigger and monitor your logistics in a single application within your enterprise projects.

Meanwhile, we offer 3 demand categories: Material, service and resource demands with different demand types to cover different business scenarios. In case you’re interested to learn more about project demands, please have a look at my dedicated blog post.

As part of the material demands, we introduce the new demand type “Project Stock, Reservation”. With this type, a project procurement controller has the option to reserve a certain quantity of a material for the project at a certain date. The respective material is reserved from project stock.

When the demand gets requested, the reservation item gets generated. With this release, we do have the restriction that the reservations which are generated out of the project do not generate requirements. However, with the upcoming releases we plan on having the functionality in place so that an MRP run reads the reservation and automatically triggers the requirements if needed.

Figure 1: The new demand type “Project Stock, Reservation” enables project procurement controllers to plan and reserve material for a project from project stock

 

 

Creating a Project by Copying an Existing Project Using an API

This highlight can be extremely time saving when creating projects. We have enhanced the already existing API “Enterprise Project” which you can make use of for enterprise projects as well as professional services projects. In addition to the functionality which was available even before this release, which is create, read, update and delete the project definition or the project elements of projects, we now also allow for the copying of projects.

When copying a project with this API, the API takes an existing project as reference and automatically creates a new project by copying this reference project. Along with the project, all parameters are copied as well such as the appropriate IDS, planned dates, the demands etc. Moreover, you have the possibility to copy settlement rules.

Figure 2: The enhanced “Enterprise Project” API allows for automatic creation of a project based on a reference project.

 

 

Integration with Project Plan Collaboration

With SAP Project and Resource Management (formerly known as SAP S/4HANA Cloud for projects) we offer two services: project management and resource management.

With Project Management as part of SAP Project and Resource Management, you can manage the project from an execution point of view. What we now offer are public APIs to create project plans and allow for interaction from outside with the project plan functionality in SAP Project and Resource Management. Having this feature in place means that the integration in both directions is possible and you can easily access external tools to consolidate project information. As asynchronous processing is allowed, process efficiency is increased.

Moreover, we offer now as well direct integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by direct API calls. With this we reduce TCO for our customers because the SAP Integration Suite is not a prerequisite anymore. Importing project plans can happen for enterprise projects as well as professional services projects. The user can create related object entries to allow for navigation between the user interfaces. On top of the initial import, we provide update functionality to keep existing project plans consistent in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Project and Resource Management.

Figure 3: The integration with “Project Plan Collaboration” via public APIs allows you to interact from outside with the project plan functionality in SAP Project and Resource Management.

 

 

Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative “SAP Project and Resource Management – Scheduling of Projects”

In case you want to learn more about this bi-directional integration and especially the project scheduling capabilities we offer as part of SAP Project and Resource Management, we highly recommend you to participate in the new Customer Engagement Initiative “

Figure 4: Join the SAP Customer Influence Program for SAP Project and Resource Management - Scheduling of projects.

 

 

More Information

If you are interested in the latest and greatest blog posts on Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management, please have a look at my collection blog and also take a look at the Community page for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (Project Control) and also check out the blog post on Professional Services published by my colleague Katharina Stopf.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Community to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts.

Follow us on @SAP and #S4HANA, and myself on LinkedIn and X.

 

📽 Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find a 30-minute-long recording and a presentation for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management as well as 19 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand – anywhere, anytime.

 

🔎Find All of Our Assets

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
Hi @@notify

I have taken my frustration of SAP Learnings current focus as demonstrated by the comments above on making "things look pretty" and "using AI to make giving suggestions to people for possible career development opportunities" and decided to create the following the SuccessFactors Learning/ Improvement Request that would actually make our jobs as LMS administrators easier:

Import Job or addition of a Connector Description for Custom Fields descriptions upload/update

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/328839

Have a read on how I believe this issue could be solved, please comment to give us your thoughts and Vote for it, if you believe that it is something that would greatly benefit us the LMS administrators and improve the product overall.

Regards,

Nathan H.

PS: While on the topic of these enhancement Requests/ideas I am really getting frustrated with SAP focus on "Thank you for your idea submission! As our current focus is on Reimagining the User Experience, expanding our Skill and Capability based learning model, offering Intelligent Learning Recommendations and Opportunities across the SuccessFactors Suite, and providing the most modern tracking and reporting tools, this idea is not planned for delivery on the current roadmap. As we look to enhance this area of the learning process, we will review and consider your idea at that time".  

While we are waiting for enhancements that we have requested/supported like:

REQUEST SF SUPPORT FOR TIN CAN API
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/47258
Submitted on: Feb 1, 2017
Status:  Accepted
Votes:   228

Mass modification/deletion of History Data
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/221413
Status:  Accepted
Votes:   264
NOT ON THE ROAD MAP!

Instructor Record Learning and attachment supporting Documentation functionality in One Step Request ID: 206376, 
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/206376 
Status: For Long-term Consideration (Decision: "Under Review for Portfolio")
Votes:   101
Decision Date:  2022-12-23
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2023

Recording completions for multiple people
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/233122 
Status: For Long-term Consideration (Decision: Next update in Q4/2020)
Votes:   66
Decision Date:  2022-12-23
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2023

Custom Columns within Notification Template Tag
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/242704
Status:  For Long-term Consideration
Votes:   22
Decision Date:  2021-06-04
Decision:  Next update in Q2/2022

Integrate photographic capability on (a) mobile device with task checklist to attach evidence
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/206448 
Status: Acknowledged
Votes:   33
Decision Date:  2020-04-15
Decision:    Next update in Q1/2022

Allow a task observer to attach one or more files when recording learning
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/234558 
Status: Under Review
Votes:   56
Decision Date:  2020-02-07
Decision:    Next update in Q4/2021

(Record learning for) Licences (& other learning types) that have future issue date
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/218796 
Status: Under Review
Votes:   35

It is almost like SAP SuccessFactors Learning development team have gotten distracted by the "bright and shiny" new toy of Intelligent Learning Recommendations and have forgotten that this is a tool that a large majority of the companies use as a Compliance tool for their workforce!  Which in Australia with the new "industrial Manslaughter" legislation that is being rolled out across the country is of critical importance as the changes have massive impacts for individuals and companies alike.

 I almost feel like we are being "gaslighted" by SAP, in them accepting some of the above requests and then doing nothing with them!  It unfortunately seems to have been a long time since I have seen an enhancement in a release that improves the Learning Administration functionality of this Module!  Can anyone give me an example from the past few years as I would be happy to be proved wrong? 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: jConnect version for HA functionality
entry.content: You tagged your question with SAP Java Connector, which I don't think has anything to do with your question.

entry.title: Re: SQL Database size suddenly increased SAP Business One
entry.content:
Please look at the SAP note 2078341: (How to Maintain Database and Log File Settings for SAP Business One)

https://me.sap.com/notes/2078341/E

entry.title: Acquired model variables do not filter data
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling to understand the point of model variables as they don't filter the data in an optimized SAC story +
when scheduling/bursting a story - the variable value also doesn't filter the story.

As an example using the planned events sample model I created a variable on City to prompt for a single City value.
It doesn't filter the story at all (yep I've checked the story table settings to for story vs widget variable options)
Scheduling the story and selecting the 'prompt' option to burst the story for different recipients also does nothing.

entry.title: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expr
entry.content:
When I activate the code, it shows  The method "ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT" does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expressions. The coding as following:

    CALL METHOD uo_model_holder->add
      EXPORTING
        im_screen_view = lo_custom_view
        im_position    = uo_model_holder->zzget_next_subview_count( ).

May I know what is wrong with the coding? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Budget Control at Purchase Requisition (PR) Level in...
entry.content:
Sorry.

Here is an updated link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/30cb8deab95e4d8c9420aeabb2ae496f.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: 🟠 Craft Enterprise Apps for iOS, iPadOS, and VisionOS with SAP Fiori and SAP Build Code
entry.content: Explore how to design and develop enterprise mobile applications for Apple platforms, including iOS, iPadOS, and visionOS. This session begins with an idea for an app and data, demonstrating how to apply SAP Fiori for iOS Design Guidelines to create an intuitive and visually compelling user interface. Leveraging SwiftUI and SAP BTP SDK for iOS, we will demonstrate the development process, ensuring your app delivers a seamless experience across various devices. By the end of the session, you will be equipped with the knowledge to build sophisticated, scalable, and efficient applications tailored to your enterprise's unique needs.

entry.title: Re: Inspection result was not transferred to batch classification with UD
Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in
entry.content: The problem is exactly what the message says - the method has to implement a returning parameter if it is used in expressions.

entry.title: SAP Named a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Recurring Billing Applications
entry.content:
Just yesterday, Martin Barkman announced SAP was named a Leader in the first-ever 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Recurring Billing Applications. Gain access to the full report and read the announcement here. 

For our community of developers, partners, and users, we believe this recognition attests to the innovation and collaboration that drives our success. It’s a clear signal that we are on the right path, delivering solutions that not only meet but exceed market expectations. 

Why This Recognition Matters  

SAP stands out as the only true ERP vendor offering a top-tier recurring billing solution seamlessly integrated with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Our customers seamlessly connect their billing processes with other critical business functions via the end-to-end suite powered by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Subscription Billing.  

Being named a Leader in Gartner®’s Magic Quadrant™ is a significant achievement, not just for SAP but for our entire ecosystem of customers, partners, and community members. For our customers, this recognition reaffirms the value of choosing SAP as their trusted partner for subscription billing and recurring revenue management. It signals that SAP is not only capable of meeting current market demands, but is also well-positioned to lead the industry in the years to come. 

This recognition is also a call to action. As leaders in the field, we have a responsibility to continue pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in subscription billing and recurring revenue management. We invite our community members to engage with us, explore our solutions, and share their insights and experiences. 

For our latest customer success stories and to learn more about our solution, visit our NEW SAP Subscription Billing community page.

entry.title: I am executing Rebate Settlement , Credit memo generated with negative value. Change in Rebate %
entry.content:
I am executing Rebate Settlement in s4/Hana, Credit memo generated with negative value.

Reason is the Change in Rebate contract percentage previously its 12% and now it 11%. 

Need to settle credit memo in positive.

entry.content:

There is a part for Analytic Models as well.

entry.title: Re: Query not working for Customer Specific Price List (G...
entry.content:
Hello Carlo,

Please have a look at this KBA: 3195901 - How to Query Campaign Specific Price List via the Web Service QuerySalesPriceListIn.  When querying a sales price list, the header key names has to be passed in the query. For customer specific price list, the header key name is Account. 

Kindly refer to the sample query in the KBA and adapt your query, and try again.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?

I expect you have some Buttons (Icons) at the right side of each part (tool) to organize the tools.

You should have a tabstrip above the tools. I've found your desired layout in the tabstrip with title "Desktop 1".

Kind regards,
Ulrich

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 beta program
entry.content:
See note 3485708

Back-end requirements

Please check following notes, if they are applicable to your backend system.

Source Editor (CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT)

  • 3450882 - Editor: Java SAPGUI ABAP Edit Control support

In case of experiencing dumps when navigating to screens using CL_GUI_SOURCEEDIT like in ABAP Workbench, this note is required.

entry.title: Re: Report on SAP Signavio Process Intelligence data using the new OData API and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @niels1515, 

one use case is that you want to centralise all your process analytics efforts into one reporting and analytics layer like SAC, so that your business analyst does not have to go into multiple solutions to find their process insights. With this API, you can extend your current analysis of a process in SAC with additional process mining findings. Let me know if this makes sense to you.

Best regards,

Hoang

entry.title: Re: RAP Line item - Change page size parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

The page_size is odata parameters. when you call service then you can change odata parameter

entry.title: Supplier Invoice Payment Terms
entry.content:
Is it possible to configure the due date of supplier payment terms based on posting date of the supplier invoice ? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier Invoice Payment Terms
entry.content:
Currently it is not possible to have payment terms based on posting date. It will consider only Invoice Date or Receipt date.  

You can configure this in this path in bydesign system:

  1. Go to the Business Configuration work center
  2. Go to the Implementation Projects view
  3. Select Open Activity List and navigate to Fine Tuning tab
  4. Select the Activities - Supplier
  5. Select Define Payment Terms for Procurement
  6. Select the relevant Payment Term
  7. Under column "calculate due date based on" , choose "Invoice Date" or "Receipt date".

entry.title: Re: AC671 assigning COD to company code 1500
entry.content: Hi, I also get this error. But when I click on the note it says it doesn't exist

entry.title: Re: Integation SAP S4hana Public Cloud with 3rd Party SW...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, please use a middleware like SAP Cloud Integration, since it provides several options to specify technical protocols to connect to a sender/receiver system. Please find all options listed here: SAP Cloud Integration - Adapters. 

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Inbound Delivery after Production Confirmation in PMR Process
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am testing PMR Process. After staging (/SCWM/STAGE) materials at PSA, I confirmed(co11n) the Production Order. Then by following the steps in the below link I could create a Inbound Delivery in EWM after Production Confirmation.
https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/receiving-finished-products-against-manufacturing-order-using-rfui-in-sap/bc-p/13782614#M5425


Then i created the Warehouse task w.r.t Inbound Delivery and executed. Then the System triggered PPF action (Send ERP Delivery Message). But when i searched for Inbound Delivery in ERP i could not find it. I also checked in Inbound & Outbound Queue, there is no Queue stuck relevant to this Inbound delivery to ERP.
How do i find the Inbound Delivery in ERP or  am i missing any config. ?
I request you to please guide me to solve this issue.

i really appreciate your help.

Thank you,

Regards,
VG Reddy

entry.title: Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not app...
Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not appearing
entry.content:
Hi, thank you for your response.

So my type Z1 notification type is not appearing, when trying to create a notification from the ssam. Yes I expect it in the client. The notification type has been customized in the backend.

I also added the types you see in the app vs the types I have in iw21:

The persona I am using is the Maintenance Technician.

I also tried the oMDO SMAXXXX_NOTIF_TYPE. Here I created a new "user profile parameter" rule with parameter ID VMP_NOT_TYP and set the parameter in su3 to Z1. For all the "z" order type we don't face any issues. But for the "z" notification types" we don't have all visible.

 

BR

entry.title: Re: Blank material in PR created via production order
entry.content:
Hi @Tina_Guevarra, 

When creating a purchase requisition from a production operation - so-called external processing in SAP - you order the operation work from a vendor, not a material with a material master record. In your purchase requisition you will not find a material number, only a material short text which is the same as your operation short text. 

In case this does not answer your question please provide more details and maybe screenshots and which SAP ERP software you are using. Thank you!

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in
entry.content: Please share the coding and the signature of the zzget_next_subview_count method

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a R...
entry.content: Please don't post comments or additional questions as answers.

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content:
happy to help
both solutions lead to the same result.       The format you need is different: 4.56 (h) = 4:33 (h:mm)

entry.title: Career Transition Story
entry.content:
As someone currently exploring a career transition, I am particularly motivated to gain new skills and certifications that will allow me to transition into a role where I can leverage my experience while embracing new opportunities. The decision to pursue the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core is a key part of this transition. I believe that this certification will enable me to successfully pivot into a new field, bringing a fresh perspective and valuable experience to my future career endeavors.

I am experienced HR Professional with 6+ years of experience in human resources management, now transitioning into SAP SuccessFactors consulting. Demonstrates a deep understanding of HR processes, including talent acquisition, employee relations, performance management, and organizational development. Currently expanding expertise in SAP SuccessFactors to leverage advanced HR technology for optimizing HR functions and driving strategic improvements. Strong aptitude for learning and applying new technologies, with a focus on enhancing HR efficiency and effectiveness through successful implementation and configuration of SuccessFactors modules. Proven track record in developing and executing HR strategies that align with business goals, complemented by a commitment to mastering SAP SuccessFactors to deliver innovative and impactful HR solutions.

I am particularly drawn to this certification because of its comprehensive coverage of the core elements of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, including data models, business rules, workflows, and security. The knowledge and skills gained through this certification will enable me to effectively contribute to improving HR processes, implementing new systems, or advancing digital transformation initiatives.

In my commitment to achieving the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, I have thoroughly explored and identified valuable self-study materials on the SAP Learning website. The official resources available there, including detailed training guides, interactive learning modules, and practice exams, have provided me with the structured and comprehensive content necessary to build a strong foundation in SAP SuccessFactors. I am confident that these resources will play a crucial role in my preparation and success in the certification process.

As I embark on this new journey, I wish everyone the best of luck in their own career paths and future endeavors. May we all continue to grow, learn, and achieve our goals.

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in
entry.content: method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT. *{ INSERT SHDK904575 1 * RE_COUNT = LINES( SUBVIEWS ) + 1. *} INSERT endmethod. What is the signature of the method?

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content:
happy to help
both solutions lead to the same result.       The format you need is different: 4.56 (h) = 4:33 (h:mm)
..

Please accept the answer and close the question

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hello,

My submission for task 2.

entry.title: Re: Display RFQ and PR Associated to outline agreement (C...
entry.content: Dear @jagdeepsingh83 I checked that with users and for them the contract is liked to the RFQ not to the PR so they did not accept why they shoul link the PR to contract and even If I do that , we still need the RFQ to be displayed (linked)

entry.title: Change Payment Terms in Preliminary Billing Document for Down Payment Requests
entry.content:
Hi all, 

 

is it possible to enable changing payment perms in preliminary billing document for down payment requests (FAZ). 

This is possible for standard billing document requests but for down payments it seems not possible. Is there a configuration where this can be enabled?

Thanks and BR, 

Sorosch

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Hamburg #4
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community Hamburg,
am 26.09.2024 ist es wieder soweit - der nächste SAP Stammtisch in Hamburg findet statt. Es wird rund um das Thema SAP Business AI gehen und welche Alternativen es für On-Premise Systeme geben könnte. Wir freuen uns auf einen guten Austausch in unserer Lieblingslocation an der Alster!⚓

Bitte meldet euch hier für die Veranstaltung an.

 Wir freuen uns auf euch!

entry.title: Re: Remote Code Analysis in ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) – FAQ
entry.content:
> Can the ATC check runs be planned periodically?

You indicated that this is possible but the Scheduling Run Series in the Central System docs do not describe this. Rather, by "schedule" they mean "can be run once in the background".

I don't see anywhere in the docs or in the transaction where one can specify daily, monthly etc.

entry.title: Re: Mapping Text ID to Forms - Report, App, CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Annika,

Could you please provide more details to the use case you are referring to? In general, the Text IDs are defined in SSCUIs and for a particular Form, you can extract XML for an example document and check which Texts (and their IDs) are available to the Form.

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: HANA Calculations views usage statistics from AFO tool
entry.content: Hi, how to U get the overall usage of calculation view. We have tried the different views in the sys space but still some CV is not visible in statistics

entry.title: Re: Different between service-binding and binding?
entry.content: Hello, How to Get Credentials for a Deployed Instance using BTP CLI: I found no way to get to the crdetials of deployed instance cloud-logging btp show services/instance command does not exists and btp get services/instance does not retrieve the credtials. I only found a way to get the credtials using cf cli, Create a service key and retrieve service key. Is this the soultion? Best regards, Antonia

entry.title: Extract peer SSL certificate automatically to resolve SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED
entry.content:
Hi there.

I am looking for a solution to extract a missing peer SSL certificate and add it to the trust store via ABAP.

For the second part, adding it to the trust store, I already found a solution.

What's now still missing is the step to extract the SSL certificate from peer automatically.

Any ideas how to do this in ABAP?

BR

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me: API available
entry.content: Interesting topic about this: LeanIX plans to auto load system and installation data into their repo - and would need an API for this as well. As this is on the roadmap of LeanIX - anybody heard any news on this API? 😄

entry.title: How to adopt Group Reporting for existing public cloud accounting customers
entry.content:
If you already live for years and you are now looking forward to getting your corporate close supported with S4HC Group Reporting, this article may help you adopt the solution quickly and efficiently. We will explain which general activities needs to be done to be ready using S4HC Group Reporting. 

Firstly you need activate the main scope item 1SG(Group Reporting - Financial Consolidation) in your system.

Master Data

You may prepare your master data, 

Activity - Descriptionrelated areaSSCUI or AppDescription of Fiori apps / SSCUIGeneral Comment
Create Company IDsMaster DataSSCUICreate CompanyEnsure all companies are prepared. Usually this is done when creating company code, but check if this activity is done.
Assign Company ID to Company CodeMaster DataSSCUIAssign company code to companyIn assumption there is no flexible derivation of consolidation units, ensure 1:1 assignment to company codes.
Assign Company ID to vendor / customer/ GL accountMaster DataAppMaintain Business PartnerEnsure all intercompany customers/vendors/GL accounts with correct company assignment.
Decide which additional data should be released from FI and how is the setup of these master data (e.g. decide for matrix consolidation, master data and hierarchy setup)Master DataSSCUIDefine Consolidation Master Data FieldsIn case customer want to maintain master data and / or hierarchy for the respective field(s).
Adjust or create a new version Master DataSSCUICreate Version from Reference Version /
Define Version		Copy and adjust a version if you cannot use a pre-delivered version. 
Create FS itemsMaster DataAppDefine FS Items Scope items 1SG deliver appr. 210+ FS items to be used directly. Check if additional FS Items are needed and copy similar FS Items from pre-delivered content. Make sure the correct attributes are assigned. 
Create and assign mapping GL accounts to FS itemsMaster DataAppMap FS Items with GL Accounts
Import FS Item Mappings
Assign FS Item Mappings		Ensure all FI accounts are mapped to FS item. There is a recommendation to mapp even secondary cost elements to a clearing FI item.
Define consolidation units for each company with the same technical key
Define consolidation units for none integrated company codes		Master DataAppDefine consolidation unitsYou may consider to prepare this based on the company ID
Assign consolidation units to consolidation groupMaster DataAppManage Group Structure - Group ViewSet the period and year for technical first consolidation
Create subitems based on new transaction typesMaster DataSSCUIDefine Subitem Categories and Subitemsadjust 19 transaction types with respective number of subitems, in case customer define the new transaction type, you need create additional subitem (s).
Check if new selection for breakdown category are needed. If yes adjusted breakdown category with copied selection.
Create subitems based on new functional areasMaster DataSSCUIDefine Subitem Categories and Subitemsadjust 21 function areas with subitems, in case customer create new function areas, then you need create additional subitem.
Specify Account Numbers for Annual Net Income and Balance CarryforwardMaster DataSSCUISpecify Account Numbers for Annual Net Income and Balance CarryforwardYou need this activity if customer does not want to use the predefined GL account and FS item.
Define Group Reporting Preparation LedgersMaster DataSSCUIDefine Group Reporting Preparation Ledgersif not already set

Process adjustments

If best practice setting is not sufficient design task groups(for Data Monitor and Consolidation Monitor), you may 

  1. copy existing task group(s) and
  2. adjust based on customer needs
  3. insert new task(s) or exclude tasks which are not needed
  4. assign task group(s) to respective version(s) 
Activity - Descriptionrelated areaSSCUI or AppDescription of Fiori apps / SSCUIGeneral Comment
Import Foreign Exchange Rates Process PreparationAppImport Foreign Exchange Rates 
Adjust task group or task group assignment for Data Monitor if neededProcess Adjustment SSCUIcopy task group, assign task group, assign new task, delete not used task
=> several SSCUI's		 
Adjust task group or task group assignment for Consolidation Monitor if neededProcess Adjustment SSCUIcopy task group, assign task group, assign new task, delete not used task
=> several SSCUI's		 
Adjust selections if customer specific selections are needed. Process PreparationAppDefine SelectionsCopy already existing selections to customer namespaces (refer to note 2326112 for Namespace restriction in SSCUI.
• S, Q, R, X, P, Y for alphanumeric fields
• 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 0 for numeric fields

Reporting

Activity - Descriptionrelated areaSSCUI or AppDescription of Fiori apps / SSCUIGeneral Comment
Adjust Reporting capabilitiesReportingAppManage Global HierarchiesAdjust the hierarchies for :
- Type FS Items (if new FS Items are created)
- Type Transaction Type
- Type document Type 
Adjust Reporting RuleReportingAppDefine Reporting Rules / Assign Reporting Rules to VersionsAdopt the reporting rule

Initial Load of Reported Financial Data

After all setting is prepared, you may need consider to prepare your initial reported data. In this article, we introduce the technical first consolidation starting point that can be different from your cutoff date. The starting point is the time(period/year) for the initial technical consolidation of the capital and the investment values. After starting point onwards, the correct consolidated financial statements including all consolidation entries should be carried out and posted in a correct period ranking in S4HCGR.

There is no migration of already posted consolidation financial statements. If consolidation results needs to be available(for comparison purpose) in your S4 system, that have already been completed in the past, these closing must be processed/executed and posted again in the Group Reporting environment.

Here is an example, 

Go live is 004/2024, and starting point is 012/2023, periods 012/2023, 001/2024, 002/2024, 003/2024 need to be processed and finished in Group Reporting. And we need to provide as of the starting point the initial load of reported financial data in 012/2023 based on YTD(year to date) value.

There are several customer situations together with examples we would like to explain.

Customer Case 1

Customer Case 2

Customer Case 3

Customer Case 4

Customer Case 5(initial load via flexible upload of reported financial data)

Customer Case 6(initial load via flexible upload of reported financial data)

This will not cover each every customer situation, and your feedback or best practice is warmly welcome!

entry.title: Re: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes b...
entry.content: TimeBetween() function should work . https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_BUSINESS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM/987ff4008e2d47fb9f92f7b085a204cd/470fbb4985634a53a61fd9a2deeb9533.html

entry.title: Re: Can see only a Learner view and not the admin view as earlier
entry.content: Hi Dirk and Shane, thank you for your answers! My bad, I did not mention that the only person who uses the client account is me. I am also the administrator. No one in the client side knows how to work with SEN, or has accessed it in the last few months, nor knows how to (is willing to) change any permissions. Now the issue is, the entire client side is now without any content. No other user ID had access to the content.

entry.title: Re: Can see only a Learner view and not the admin view as...
entry.content: Hi Dirk, Thank you for your answer. I will check with my client's IT team if this could be a reason. Thanks!

Thanks and Regards 

Salma

I also work in a SAP partner called LinuxPlus

I am very interested to join the digital skills initiative and looking forward to hearing from you soon 

 

Thanks and Regards 

Salma

entry.title: SAP Integration Suiteを使ってSAP Datasphereからデータを抽出する方法 OData編
entry.content:
はじめに

SAP の連携ツールである SAP Integration Suite を使用して SAP Datasphere からデータを抽出するには、以下の2つの方法があります。本ブログでは①の方法について紹介します。

① SAP Datasphere の OData サービスを利用したデータ抽出(本ブログ)

② SAP Datasphere データベースユーザでの JDBCを利用したデータ抽出(次回ブログにて記載予定)

今回は下記のバージョンで検証を行いました。
SAP Datasphere : バージョン2024.16.46
SAP Integration Suite : バージョン 3.66.0

手順

  1. SAP Datasphere で OAuth クライアントを作成する

  2. SAP Integration Suite で OAuth2 Authorization Code を作成・認証する
  3. SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow を作成する
  4. SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow をデプロイする
  5. SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow の動作を確認する

ポイント

  • SAP Datasphere が 3-legged OAuth 2.0 であるため、SAP Integration Suite 側で OAuth2 Authorization Code を作成する必要があります
  • SAP Datasphere で作成する OAuth クライアントの用途は「インタラクティブ用途」を設定します
  • SAP Datasphere には、OAuth2 Authorization Code 認証時の SAP Datasphere ユーザでアクセスするため、当該ユーザが参照できる範囲のオブジェクトのデータが抽出できます

ここから具体的な方法を紹介します。

手順1.SAP Datasphere で OAuth クライアントを作成する

1.SAP Datasphere にログインします

2.トップページのナビゲーションバーから システム > 管理 を選択します

3.[アプリ統合] タブをクリックします

4.OAuth クライアント の [+ 新規 OAuth クライアントを追加] をクリックします

5.以下の情報を入力し、[追加] ボタンをクリックして OAuth クライアントを作成します

  • 名称: 任意のOAuth クライアントの名称（この例では Cloud_Integration）
  • 目的: インタラクティブ用途 を選択
  • リダイレクト URI: https://<hostname>/itspaces/odata/api/v1/OAuthTokenFromCode
    （Token Service が Authorization Code を返す（リダイレクトする） SAP Cloud Integration の URI）


参考: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant

6.[シークレットコードをコピー] ボタンをクリックしてクリップボードにコピーしたクライアントシークレットをメモ帳などにコピーしておきます

7.併せて “OAuth クライアント ID” もメモ帳などにコピーしておきます

8.[アプリ統合] タブの OAuth クライアントに表示されている “権限 URL” と “トークン URL” もメモ帳などにコピーしておきます

手順2.SAP Integration Suite で OAuth2 Authorization Code を作成・認証する

1.SAP Integration Suite にログインします

2.Monitor > Integrations and APIs をクリックします

3.Security Material のタイルをクリックします

4.[Create] をクリックして表示されるコンテキストメニューから [OAuth2 Authorization Code] を選択します

5.Create OAuth2 Authorization Code ダイアログで以下の情報を入力し、[Deploy] ボタンをクリックします

  • Name: 任意の名称（この例では Datasphere_AuthCode）
  • Provider: Generic を選択
  • Authorization URL: SAP Datasphere の認証 URL（前の手順でコピーしたもの）
  • Token Service URL: SAP Datasphere のトークン URL（前の手順でコピーしたもの）
  • Client ID: SAP Datasphere で作成した OAuth クライアントのクライアント ID（前の手順でコピーしたもの）
  • Client Secret: SAP Datasphere で作成した OAuth クライアントのクライアントシークレット（前の手順でコピーしたもの）
  • Send As: Body Parameter を選択
  • User Name: SAP Datasphere のログインユーザ名
  • Scope: 空白で OK

作成した OAuth2 Authorization Code の Status が Unauthorized になっているので、認証をおこないます

6.作成した OAuth2 Authorization Code の　[More] ボタン( ... )をクリックして表示されるコンテキストメニューから [Authorize] を選択します

7.Information ダイアログで内容を確認し、[OK] ボタンをクリックします

8.SAP Datasphere のログオン画面で、ユーザ名とパスワードを入力して [ログオン] ボタンをクリックします

9.認証成功のメッセージを確認します

10.OAuth2 Authorization Code の Status が Deployed になっていることを確認します

手順3.SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow を作成する

1.SAP Integration Suite のホームページから Design > Integrations and APIs をクリックします

2.[Create] ボタンをクリックしてコンテンツパッケージを作成します

3.以下の情報を入力して [Save] ボタンをクリックします

  • Name: 任意のパッケージ名（この例では Datasphere_OData_Integration）
  • Technical Name: Name の内容から自動設定
  • Short Description: 任意の概要説明

4.Artifacts タブに移動します

5.Add をクリックして表示されるコンテキストメニューから [Integration Flow] を選択します

6.Add Integration Flow ダイアログで以下の情報を入力し、[Add] ボタンをクリックします

  • Create を選択
  • Name: 任意の Integration Flow 名（この例では Datasphere_Odata_iFlow）
  • ID: Name から自動入力
  • Runtime Profile: Cloud Integration
  • Description: 任意の説明
  • Sender: 空白
  • Receiver: 空白

​デプロイ時に一回だけ起動し、SAP Datasphere からデータを取得する Integration Flow を作成します

7.Artifacts から追加した Integration Flow を選択します

8.右のような Integration Flow を作成します

  • Request Reply から Receiver への接続では、[HTTP] を選択します

9.Groovy Script の Processing タブをクリックします

10.Script File の [Select] ボタンをクリックします

11.Select Resource ダイアログで、Local Resources タブをクリックして、[Upload from File System] ボタンをクリックします

12.次のコードが記述されている Groovy Script ファイルをアップロードします(エディタ上で直接コードを記述することも可能です)

  • 8行目の "Datasphere_AuthCode" 部分には前の手順で作成したOAuth2 Authorization Code 名を入れてください  

 

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import com.sap.it.api.securestore.SecureStoreService;
import com.sap.it.api.securestore.AccessTokenAndUser;
import com.sap.it.api.securestore.exception.SecureStoreException;
import com.sap.it.api.ITApiFactory;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    SecureStoreService secureStoreService = ITApiFactory.getService(SecureStoreService.class, null);
    AccessTokenAndUser accessTokenAndUser = secureStoreService.getAccesTokenForOauth2AuthorizationCodeCredential(“Datasphere_AuthCode");
    String token = accessTokenAndUser.getAccessToken();
    message.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
    message.setHeader("Authorization", "Bearer "+token);
    def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
    if (messageLog != null) {
        messageLog.setStringProperty("logging#1", "accessTokenAndUser=" + accessTokenAndUser.toString()); 
        messageLog.setStringProperty("logging#2", "token=" + token); 
    }
    return message;
}

 

 

13.HTTP の Connection タブをクリックし、以下の情報を入力します

  • Address: データを取得する SAP Datasphere の OData API 
  • Query: OData API をコールするときのクエリパラメータ
  • Proxy Type: Internet を選択
  • Method: GET を選択
  • Authentication: None を選択
  • Request Headers: Authorization　（必須）
  • Response Headers: *

※データを取得する SAP Datasphere の OData API については、こちらのヘルプページをご参照ください。今回はアクセス可能なスペースを一覧で取得するOData APIを利用したため、 https://<tenant_url>/api/v1/dwc/catalog/assets　としています。

手順4.SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow をデプロイする

1.[Save] ボタンをクリックします

2.[Deploy] ボタンをクリックします

3.Confirmation ダイアログで Runtime Profile でCloud Integrationを選択して、[Yes] ボタンをクリックします

4.Deployment ダイアログで [OK] ボタンをクリックします

5.Deployment Status タブをクリックし、Deployment Status と Runtime Status を確認します

6.Navigate to Manage Integration Content リンクをクリックします

7.Manage Integration Content 画面で実行状態を確認します

8.Integration Flow の実行をトレースするためにLog Configuration の Log Level を Trace に変更します

9.Integration Flow の Edit 画面で再度 [Deploy] ボタンをクリックし、Integration Flow をデプロイします

手順5.SAP Integration Suite で Integration Flow の動作を確認する

1.Monitor > Integrations and APIs をクリックします

2.Monitor Message Processing の All Artifacts タイルをクリックします

3.作成・デプロイした Integration Flow を選択します

4.Logs タブをクリックし、Log Level の Trace リンクをクリックします

5.Run Steps の End をクリックします

6.Message Content をクリックします

7.Payload タブをクリックして、データが取得できていることを確認します（JSON 形式）

以上ですべての手順が完了しました。最後までお読みいただきありがとうございました。

Special thanks to Ikeguchi Daisuke-san!

entry.title: Re: Where to deploy RAG application for SAP Gen AI Hub
entry.content:
Hi @Vitaliy-R ,

Thanks for your response. The app which I am referring to is the backend service app where my RAG implementation will be in. I am coding in Python and using this as a server code. Where can I host this code, so its API is accessible by other services in BTP?

Please refers to the rough visualization below. I would like to know which the best place is to host the Python back-end code. Currently I am looking into containerizing the Python code with Docker and deploy the docker image in SAP Cloud Foundry. Is that a proper way to do it?

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter August 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,
Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training courses, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.
The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

 

SAP Datasphere Fundamentals

Boost your SAP Datasphere project by joining one of our new Expert-guided Implementation virtual workshops. Our aim is that through the course of these enablement sessions we help you understand key concepts and see a quicker time to value when adopting SAP Datasphere.

Details and dates in this blog post

Introduction of SAP Cloud ALM

Are you new to SAP Cloud ALM, looking to educate yourself about this topic? Gain a first understanding of what SAP Cloud ALM offers, understand its significance, and explore ways to onboard. How? We have a great recording of our recent virtual expert session for you.

Access here: Introduction of SAP Cloud ALM

E-Learning: SAP Analytics Cloud Enterprise Planning

Take our new E-learning, which is designed to guide you through a full interactive overview on Enterprise Planning with SAP Analytics Cloud. This comes with a sample dataset included so that you can follow along in your own tenant at your own pace.

Access through this blog: SAP Analytics Cloud Enterprise Planning

Digital Badges - Show Your Digital Skills to the World!

Did you know we currently offer six learning programs that include an official SAP digital badge? You can earn these badges after successful completion of the specific learning program and share within your network as proof of achievement.

Take the chance and earn your badge today!

Guiding You to Achieve a Clean Core

Enterprise Support. Get started by visiting SAP Enterprise Support value maps. Included with every SAP Cloud subscription, value maps offer structured, product-level Learning Rooms where you can navigate to curated content, be directed to self-service platforms, and engage with peers and SAP experts. Join today for quick access to a wealth of value acceleration content!

Watch the video

Enhanced Continuous Quality Check for SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network

Planning an SAP Ariba go-live? Adding solutions to your existing SAP Ariba suite? Need a “health check” for your productive SAP Ariba or SAP Business Network system? Our enhanced continuous quality check from SAP Enterprise Support has you covered.

Learn more

SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council Q3 Update

Join the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council (ESAC) program with our new and open workstreams for Q3, covering all major SAP Cloud solutions. Benefit from collaboration, innovation, and gain early access to new tools and resources.

Further details

Conversion to SAP S/4HANA Finance – Deep Dive Sessions

Join us in a multiday training session to discover everything you need to know about all phases and activities involved in Conversion of Accounting to SAP S/4HANA. We have new sessions open in August and September, available in Chinese and English language.

More in this blog post

How to Get Started With SAP S/4HANA Finance

Are you about to start with SAP S/4HANA Finance? Then don’t miss our interactive virtual Mee-the-Expert live sessions upcoming in September that help you get on board.

Register through this blog post: Get started with SAP S/4HANA Finance

SAP S/4HANA Finance Fundamentals–Deep Dive

Join us in a multiday training session to discover everything you need to know about delta capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Finance. We have two sessions in August, available in English and Chinese language.

More in this blog post

Watch the Replays of Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

We hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Missed the live sessions? We’ve got you covered! Watch the replays on demand.

Eastland Group: Gaining Improved Insights Into System Performance

The Eastland Group leverages SAP Cloud ALM to gain enhanced understanding of system performance, proactively identify potential issues, and perform detailed analysis through user-friendly dashboards.

Read the full quote: sap.to/61109kBuxt

Full details

AA Industrial Belting: Quickly Gaining Insights and Product Support With the Real-Time Support Approach

AA Industrial Belting was impressed by the thorough and informative guidance provided by the SAP product support and development teams regarding the features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, including legal reporting, sales analytics, and credit management. The Real-Time Support approach allowed for quick understanding and effective communication, which helped AA Industrial Belting learn about the product features efficiently.

Read the full quote: sap.to/61101kBON9

  • Guidance on signing up
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance
  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)
  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document
  • FAQ
  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps
  • SAP Support Portal
  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |
  • Formats: EGI | MTE | Program
  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar
  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me: API available
entry.content:
FYI: Maybe the CloudALM APIs could help out a bit here for system information:
https://api.sap.com/api/CALM_LMS/tryout

Thank you for the Blog. It was really helpful. 
Just wanted to ask, did you use RFC or HTTÜ adapter for the sender. Because you mentioned HTTP and in the image it is RFC adapter. 

KR,
Sayuj

entry.title: Re: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previo...
entry.content: You can achieve it using Input Controls, Dynamic Filtering, and Calculated Measures or Dimensions.

entry.title: XML tags as list in Content Modifier
entry.content:
Hello community,

I would like to output all XML tags with the same name (for example, <value>) as a list using a Content Modifier in SAP CPI. The XPath //value doesn't work for this.

Does anyone have an idea?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in
entry.content: I know what is wrong after changing the signature the the method. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: I cant believe it, what a miss ! I even have it correct a few lines above ! Thank you Ondrej you have been a massive help, Do you use Powerdesigner regularly ?

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: 👍

entry.title: Re: FAUF - Ausgabe mehrere Formulare mit gleicher Ausgabeart
entry.content:
Hallo @vanessad-1, 

Die gleiche Ausgabeart kann automatisch nur einmal ausgegeben werden nicht gleichzeitig mehrfach. Entweder Sie kombinieren die Inhalte in einer Formularvorlage oder Sie prüfen, ob andere für den Fertigungsauftrag verfügbare Ausgabearten zusätzlich genutzt werden können. 

Verfügbar sind:

  • Order Data List (ORDER_DATA_LIST)
  • Order Component List (ORDER_COMPONENT_LIST)
  • Pick List (PICK_LIST)

Viele Grüße
Franziska

entry.title: Re: Gantt chart in SAC without custom widget for order scheduling/monitoring
entry.content: Hi Serhat,

I have a follow up question:

I tried to use the query in a dashboard but i get the error "Cannot parse parameter or the query". I want to have an input parameter as the filter. 

Any tips? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Display RFQ and PR Associated to outline agreement (C...
entry.content: Dear @Prasad_Baraskar_ , I checked the link but the solution is to go by enhacement as stated by the user who asked the question in the solution, I'm looking for a stadard solution, and my contract is created in reference of RFQ not the PR BECAUSE in PR I dont have the real Price and the quantity agreed on with the chosen supplier after multipl negotiation, The flow is PR --> RFQ (multiple sent to suppliers) --> The chosen RFQ after negotiaion will be transformed to contract --> Then PO created in reference to contract. In table EKPO i dont find RFQ or PR I only fonc contract and PO numbers

entry.title: Re: SAP PO inboundRA configuration
entry.content: Only 1 inboundRA is enough from one S4 to 1 PO system.

entry.title: Re: Dunning process
entry.content:
This is a question regarding the backend business system owning the actual data, not for SAP Graph.

Google points me to SAP S/4HANA > ... > Incoming Payment Methods Suitable for Dunning - is that what you are looking for?

entry.title: Re: Auto Approval of flexible workflow based on Custom Co...
entry.content: Hi @ Would you please find more details from the KBA below? https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2841783 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2767845

entry.title: Re: Gantt chart in SAC without custom widget for order scheduling/monitoring
entry.content: Hi Serhat, thats an interesting task! Without knowing all the details, I would suggest you try it with a table. To create something that looks like your first picture, for the columns you could create restricted measures (dynamically restricted on a date dimension (you need an additional date/timestamp dimension to be able to compare it to the other dates)) for "gestern", "heute", "morgen", so that "heute" always looks at the current date and so on. Below the restricted measures the Dimension "Minutes". To create the colored lines for each order, you could try to set thresholds. For that you would have to adjust your data so you have values on each order, date and minute combination within the start and end dates. Or you can try to create a calculation for that (if date >= planned start date and date <= planned end date, then 1, else if ...) . For Order a write a 1 for each minute between start and end date. That would be your color grey if you create a threshold for values <=1. Same for the other colors, with different values between start and end dates. For the color green write value 2 (treshold >1 and <=2 ) and for red write value 3 (threshold >2). You would also have to change the threshold style to fill the background of the cell, in the styling panel of the table. I hope that helps! Contact me directly if you have further questions.

entry.title: NCo 3.1.5.0 SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters..ctor()
entry.content:
I'm pleased to see the new update for the .NET Core NCo connector. However, during testing, I encountered a problem.

The following exception was thrown:

'The type initializer for 'SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcDestinationManager' threw an exception'

at SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters..ctor() in D:\depot as\789_REL\gen\optU tamd64\krn fc co3\krn fc co3\sapnco\RfcConfiguration.cs 802

I'm using the same configuration parameters in .NET Framework 4.6.2, and they work fine. Regarding the new test environment:

  • .NET 8.0

  • Console Application

  • References added + manually included ijwhost.dll (as instructed in the installation manual)

  • Platform target x64

 

Any hint how to resolve this problem?
